channel.title: MPESB on YOJNA PORTAL 2026 - Govt Schemes & Sarkari Job Updates Daily
channel.description: Recent content in MPESB on YOJNA PORTAL 2026 - Govt Schemes & Sarkari Job Updates Daily

item.title: MPESB Nursing Officer & Sister Tutor Vacancy 2026
item.description: The MPESB Nursing Officer & Sister Tutor Recruitment 2026 has announced a total of 2317 vacancies, including 2099 Nursing Officer and 218 Sister Tutor posts. The application process will start from 06/04/2026 and continue until 20/04/2026. Candidates must have B.Sc Nursing / GNM qualification along with valid registration in the nursing council. The exam will be conducted from 15/05/2026, and selection will be based on an online examination and merit list. This recruitment offers a great opportunity for nursing candidates in Madhya Pradesh.

item.title: MPESB Group-5 Staff Nurse & Paramedical Vacancy 2026
item.description: MPESB Group-5 Recruitment 2026 notification has been released for 373 Staff Nurse, Paramedical and Other Posts. Eligible candidates can apply online from 13/03/2026 to 27/03/2026 through the official website. Candidates should check eligibility, important dates, application fee and other details before applying.
